email_logs.subject: Drone Surveys + BIM Models for BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP — Paid Trial
email_logs.body:
BIM Infra Solutions

Specialized BIM Outsourcing Partner

Hi Kishan,

If BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP uses drone surveys or LiDAR scanning, we can convert that data into accurate BIM models — fast.

Our Scan-to-BIM service:

  • Point cloud to Revit model (LOD 200–400)
  • Drone survey data processing
  • As-built documentation
  • Delivery: 3–5 business days

We offer a paid trial project — send us a sample scan, we deliver a BIM model. You only pay if satisfied.

Schedule a demo call

Best regards,
Kishan Batavia
BIM Infra Solutions
https://www.biminfrasolutions.in

BIM Infra Solutions | https://www.biminfrasolutions.in

email_logs.subject: Hirakraj, is BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP's BIM team at full capacity right now?
email_logs.body:
Hi Hirakraj,

I came across BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP and noticed you're handling significant construction/engineering projects — I wanted to reach out directly.

I'm Kishan, Co-founder & CFO at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP. We're a technology-driven BIM consultancy with 100+ projects delivered across USA, Canada, Germany, Australia and India — including a 110 km floating tunnel project for Parsons in the USA and multiple high-rise coordination projects.

A quick question: when your BIM team hits capacity during peak project phases, what does BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP typically do — hire temps, delay, or push the in-house team harder?

We step in as a seamless offshore extension. Specifically:

  • Revit modelling — Architectural, Structural, MEP (LOD 200–500)
  • Clash detection & BIM coordination (BIM 360 / ACC / Procore)
  • 4D scheduling & 5D quantity takeoffs
  • Scan-to-BIM from LiDAR / point clouds
  • Dynamo / automation scripts to cut repetitive work

We're offering 3 paid pilot slots this quarter at a fixed project rate — results in 48 hours, no long-term commitment required.

Worth a 30-minute call to see if there's a fit?

Book a 30-Min Call

📄 View Our Full Portfolio

Kishan Batavia
Co-founder & CFO — BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP
+91 94266 35181  |  kishan.batavia@biminfrasolutions.in  |  https://www.biminfrasolutions.in

email_logs.subject: Anmol, one question about how Genesys International Corp. Ltd. monitors site progress
email_logs.body:
Hi Anmol,

I'm reaching out because Genesys International Corp. Ltd.'s work in geospatial and survey services aligns closely with something we've built and deployed at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP.

We've developed INFRA X — a site intelligence platform for large infrastructure and industrial projects. It gives project owners, PMCs, and site teams a single place to monitor everything happening on ground, in real time.

Key capabilities of INFRA X:

  • Compare View — overlay planned design vs. actual site condition at any point in time, week by week
  • One-desk monitoring — all sites, all zones, all teams visible from a single dashboard — no more chasing WhatsApp updates
  • Resource allocation tracking — know exactly where manpower, machinery, and materials are deployed at any given time
  • Automated progress reports — volume calculations, milestone completion %, deviation alerts — generated without manual input
  • As-built documentation — orthomosaic maps, point clouds, and 3D models captured and stored automatically

email_logs.subject: Zoran — turning Putevi Srbije (Road Authority)'s scan data into BIM models (we've done 15+ projects)
email_logs.body:
Hi Zoran,

If Putevi Srbije (Road Authority) works with drone surveys, LiDAR scans, or point cloud data — I think what we do at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP will be directly useful to you.

We convert raw scan data into accurate, fully coordinated BIM models — architecture, structure, and MEP. Recent Scan-to-BIM projects we've delivered:

  • Rochsburg Castle, Germany — 40,000 sqmt heritage structure, LOD 300 Scan-to-BIM
  • Kampnagel Hamburg — 100,000 sqmt industrial renovation, Scan-to-BIM for Lacaton & Vassal architects
  • Bonn University — 30,000 sqmt historic building, LOD 400
  • Autobahn Viaduct, Germany — 500m historic brick bridge
  • Nikko Hotel Düsseldorf — 40,000 sqmt full hotel renovation

We deliver from raw point cloud to finished Revit model in 3–5 business days depending on complexity.

Paid pilot available: send us a sample scan file, we deliver a BIM model. You pay only if satisfied.

email_logs.subject: Steve — turning Haworth Tompkins's scan data into BIM models (we've done 15+ projects)
email_logs.body:
Hi Steve,

If Haworth Tompkins works with drone surveys, LiDAR scans, or point cloud data — I think what we do at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP will be directly useful to you.

We convert raw scan data into accurate, fully coordinated BIM models — architecture, structure, and MEP. Recent Scan-to-BIM projects we've delivered:

  • Rochsburg Castle, Germany — 40,000 sqmt heritage structure, LOD 300 Scan-to-BIM
  • Kampnagel Hamburg — 100,000 sqmt industrial renovation, Scan-to-BIM for Lacaton & Vassal architects
  • Bonn University — 30,000 sqmt historic building, LOD 400
  • Autobahn Viaduct, Germany — 500m historic brick bridge
  • Nikko Hotel Düsseldorf — 40,000 sqmt full hotel renovation

We deliver from raw point cloud to finished Revit model in 3–5 business days depending on complexity.

Paid pilot available: send us a sample scan file, we deliver a BIM model. You pay only if satisfied.

email_logs.subject: Nico, is VolkerWessels's BIM team at full capacity right now?
email_logs.body:
Hi Nico,

I came across VolkerWessels and noticed you're handling significant construction/engineering projects — I wanted to reach out directly.

I'm Kishan, Co-founder & CFO at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP. We're a technology-driven BIM consultancy with 100+ projects delivered across USA, Canada, Germany, Australia and India — including a 110 km floating tunnel project for Parsons in the USA and multiple high-rise coordination projects.

A quick question: when your BIM team hits capacity during peak project phases, what does VolkerWessels typically do — hire temps, delay, or push the in-house team harder?

We step in as a seamless offshore extension. Specifically:

  • Revit modelling — Architectural, Structural, MEP (LOD 200–500)
  • Clash detection & BIM coordination (BIM 360 / ACC / Procore)
  • 4D scheduling & 5D quantity takeoffs
  • Scan-to-BIM from LiDAR / point clouds

email_logs.subject: Damir, is GP Zagreb d.d.'s BIM team at full capacity right now?
email_logs.body:
Hi Damir,

I came across GP Zagreb d.d. and noticed you're handling significant construction/engineering projects — I wanted to reach out directly.

I'm Kishan, Co-founder & CFO at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP. We're a technology-driven BIM consultancy with 100+ projects delivered across USA, Canada, Germany, Australia and India — including a 110 km floating tunnel project for Parsons in the USA and multiple high-rise coordination projects.

A quick question: when your BIM team hits capacity during peak project phases, what does GP Zagreb d.d. typically do — hire temps, delay, or push the in-house team harder?

We step in as a seamless offshore extension. Specifically:

  • Revit modelling — Architectural, Structural, MEP (LOD 200–500)
  • Clash detection & BIM coordination (BIM 360 / ACC / Procore)
  • 4D scheduling & 5D quantity takeoffs
  • Scan-to-BIM from LiDAR / point clouds
  • Dynamo / automation scripts to cut repetitive work

We're offering 3 paid pilot slots this quarter at a fixed project rate — results in 48 hours, no long-term commitment required.

email_logs.subject: Vipul, one question about how IdeaForge monitors site progress
email_logs.body:
Hi Vipul,

I'm reaching out because IdeaForge's work in geospatial and survey services aligns closely with something we've built and deployed at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP.

We've developed INFRA X — a site intelligence platform for large infrastructure and industrial projects. It gives project owners, PMCs, and site teams a single place to monitor everything happening on ground, in real time.

Key capabilities of INFRA X:

  • Compare View — overlay planned design vs. actual site condition at any point in time, week by week
  • One-desk monitoring — all sites, all zones, all teams visible from a single dashboard — no more chasing WhatsApp updates
  • Resource allocation tracking — know exactly where manpower, machinery, and materials are deployed at any given time
  • Automated progress reports — volume calculations, milestone completion %, deviation alerts — generated without manual input
  • As-built documentation — orthomosaic maps, point clouds, and 3D models captured and stored automatically

We are currently live at the Khavada site in Gujarat — deployed for Kalpataru Projects International and Hitachi Energy India for their large-scale renewable energy and transmission infrastructure works.

Given IdeaForge's expertise in geospatial and survey services, I'd love to explore a collaboration — as a technology partner, data processing partner, or on a joint project basis.

Book a 30-Min Call

View our INFRA X portfolio →

email_logs.subject: Megan, is Jacobs Engineering's BIM team at full capacity right now?
email_logs.body:
Hi Megan,

I came across Jacobs Engineering and noticed you're handling significant construction/engineering projects — I wanted to reach out directly.

I'm Kishan, Co-founder & CFO at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP. We're a technology-driven BIM consultancy with 100+ projects delivered across USA, Canada, Germany, Australia and India — including a 110 km floating tunnel project for Parsons in the USA and multiple high-rise coordination projects.

A quick question: when your BIM team hits capacity during peak project phases, what does Jacobs Engineering typically do — hire temps, delay, or push the in-house team harder?

We step in as a seamless offshore extension. Specifically:

  • Revit modelling — Architectural, Structural, MEP (LOD 200–500)
  • Clash detection & BIM coordination (BIM 360 / ACC / Procore)
  • 4D scheduling & 5D quantity takeoffs
  • Scan-to-BIM from LiDAR / point clouds
  • Dynamo / automation scripts to cut repetitive work

We're offering 3 paid pilot slots this quarter at a fixed project rate — results in 48 hours, no long-term commitment required.

Worth a 30-minute call to see if there's a fit?

email_logs.subject: Himanshu, one question about how GarudaUAV monitors site progress
email_logs.body:
Hi Himanshu,

I'm reaching out because GarudaUAV's work in geospatial and survey services aligns closely with something we've built and deployed at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP.

We've developed INFRA X — a site intelligence platform for large infrastructure and industrial projects. It gives project owners, PMCs, and site teams a single place to monitor everything happening on ground, in real time.

Key capabilities of INFRA X:

  • Compare View — overlay planned design vs. actual site condition at any point in time, week by week
  • One-desk monitoring — all sites, all zones, all teams visible from a single dashboard — no more chasing WhatsApp updates
  • Resource allocation tracking — know exactly where manpower, machinery, and materials are deployed at any given time
  • Automated progress reports — volume calculations, milestone completion %, deviation alerts — generated without manual input
  • As-built documentation — orthomosaic maps, point clouds, and 3D models captured and stored automatically

We are currently live at the Khavada site in Gujarat — deployed for Kalpataru Projects International and Hitachi Energy India for their large-scale renewable energy and transmission infrastructure works.

Given GarudaUAV's expertise in geospatial and survey services, I'd love to explore a collaboration — as a technology partner, data processing partner, or on a joint project basis.

Book a 30-Min Call

View our INFRA X portfolio →

email_logs.body:
Hi Rahul,

I'm reaching out because IdeaForge's work in geospatial and survey services aligns closely with something we've built and deployed at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP.

We've developed INFRA X — a site intelligence platform for large infrastructure and industrial projects. It gives project owners, PMCs, and site teams a single place to monitor everything happening on ground, in real time.

Key capabilities of INFRA X:

  • Compare View — overlay planned design vs. actual site condition at any point in time, week by week
  • One-desk monitoring — all sites, all zones, all teams visible from a single dashboard — no more chasing WhatsApp updates
  • Resource allocation tracking — know exactly where manpower, machinery, and materials are deployed at any given time
  • Automated progress reports — volume calculations, milestone completion %, deviation alerts — generated without manual input
  • As-built documentation — orthomosaic maps, point clouds, and 3D models captured and stored automatically

We are currently live at the Khavada site in Gujarat — deployed for Kalpataru Projects International and Hitachi Energy India for their large-scale renewable energy and transmission infrastructure works.

Given IdeaForge's expertise in geospatial and survey services, I'd love to explore a collaboration — as a technology partner, data processing partner, or on a joint project basis.

Book a 30-Min Call

View our INFRA X portfolio →

email_logs.subject: Jake — turning Darling Geomatics's scan data into BIM models (we've done 15+ projects)
email_logs.body:
Hi Jake,

If Darling Geomatics works with drone surveys, LiDAR scans, or point cloud data — I think what we do at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP will be directly useful to you.

We convert raw scan data into accurate, fully coordinated BIM models — architecture, structure, and MEP. Recent Scan-to-BIM projects we've delivered:

  • Rochsburg Castle, Germany — 40,000 sqmt heritage structure, LOD 300 Scan-to-BIM
  • Kampnagel Hamburg — 100,000 sqmt industrial renovation, Scan-to-BIM for Lacaton & Vassal architects
  • Bonn University — 30,000 sqmt historic building, LOD 400
  • Autobahn Viaduct, Germany — 500m historic brick bridge
  • Nikko Hotel Düsseldorf — 40,000 sqmt full hotel renovation

We deliver from raw point cloud to finished Revit model in 3–5 business days depending on complexity.

Paid pilot available: send us a sample scan file, we deliver a BIM model. You pay only if satisfied.

Book a 30-Min Demo Call

email_logs.subject: Brijesh, one question about how GarudaUAV monitors site progress
email_logs.body:
Hi Brijesh,

I'm reaching out because GarudaUAV's work in geospatial and survey services aligns closely with something we've built and deployed at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP.

We've developed INFRA X — a site intelligence platform for large infrastructure and industrial projects. It gives project owners, PMCs, and site teams a single place to monitor everything happening on ground, in real time.

Key capabilities of INFRA X:

  • Compare View — overlay planned design vs. actual site condition at any point in time, week by week
  • One-desk monitoring — all sites, all zones, all teams visible from a single dashboard — no more chasing WhatsApp updates
  • Resource allocation tracking — know exactly where manpower, machinery, and materials are deployed at any given time
  • Automated progress reports — volume calculations, milestone completion %, deviation alerts — generated without manual input
  • As-built documentation — orthomosaic maps, point clouds, and 3D models captured and stored automatically

We are currently live at the Khavada site in Gujarat — deployed for Kalpataru Projects International and Hitachi Energy India for their large-scale renewable energy and transmission infrastructure works.

Given GarudaUAV's expertise in geospatial and survey services, I'd love to explore a collaboration — as a technology partner, data processing partner, or on a joint project basis.

Book a 30-Min Call

View our INFRA X portfolio →

email_logs.subject: Ankit, one question about how Skylark Drones monitors site progress
email_logs.body:
Hi Ankit,

I'm reaching out because Skylark Drones's work in geospatial and survey services aligns closely with something we've built and deployed at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP.

We've developed INFRA X — a site intelligence platform for large infrastructure and industrial projects. It gives project owners, PMCs, and site teams a single place to monitor everything happening on ground, in real time.

Key capabilities of INFRA X:

  • Compare View — overlay planned design vs. actual site condition at any point in time, week by week
  • One-desk monitoring — all sites, all zones, all teams visible from a single dashboard — no more chasing WhatsApp updates
  • Resource allocation tracking — know exactly where manpower, machinery, and materials are deployed at any given time
  • Automated progress reports — volume calculations, milestone completion %, deviation alerts — generated without manual input
  • As-built documentation — orthomosaic maps, point clouds, and 3D models captured and stored automatically

We are currently live at the Khavada site in Gujarat — deployed for Kalpataru Projects International and Hitachi Energy India for their large-scale renewable energy and transmission infrastructure works.

Given Skylark Drones's expertise in geospatial and survey services, I'd love to explore a collaboration — as a technology partner, data processing partner, or on a joint project basis.

Book a 30-Min Call

View our INFRA X portfolio →

I'm Kishan, Co-founder & CFO at BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP. We're a technology-driven BIM consultancy with 100+ projects delivered across USA, Canada, Germany, Australia and India — including a 110 km floating tunnel project for Parsons in the USA and multiple high-rise coordination projects.

A quick question: when your BIM team hits capacity during peak project phases, what does Strabag typically do — hire temps, delay, or push the in-house team harder?

We step in as a seamless offshore extension. Specifically:

  • Revit modelling — Architectural, Structural, MEP (LOD 200–500)
  • Clash detection & BIM coordination (BIM 360 / ACC / Procore)
  • 4D scheduling & 5D quantity takeoffs
  • Scan-to-BIM from LiDAR / point clouds
  • Dynamo / automation scripts to cut repetitive work

We're offering 3 paid pilot slots this quarter at a fixed project rate — results in 48 hours, no long-term commitment required.

Worth a 30-minute call to see if there's a fit?

Book a 30-Min Call

📄 View Our Full Portfolio

Kishan Batavia
Co-founder & CFO — BIM INFRASOLUTIONS LLP
+91 94266 35181  |  kishan.batavia@biminfrasolutions.in  |  https://www.biminfrasolutions.in
